questions.question: Which therapists & mental health in Los Angeles Ca are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Therapists & Mental Health in Los Angeles Ca with weekend hours include: East Los Angeles Health Center (Sat: 08:00-16:00), Alhambra Health Center (Sat: 08:00-16:00), Family Service Of Burbank (Sat: 08:00-18:00). 3 total with weekend availability.
